recommendations.title: I Origins
recommendations.overview: A molecular biologist's study of the human eye has far-reaching implications about humanity's scientific and spiritual beliefs.

recommendations.title: Bliss

recommendations.title: Amadeus
recommendations.overview: Disciplined Italian composer Antonio Salieri becomes consumed by jealousy and resentment towards the hedonistic and remarkably talented young Salzburger composer Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart.

recommendations.title: Time Is Up
recommendations.overview: Vivien, an accomplished student with a passion for physics, and Roy, a troubled young man, are involved in an accident that forces them to reclaim their lives one minute at the time.

recommendations.title: Collision Earth
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Drama
recommendations.overview: A huge solar flare blasts Mercury out of it's orbit and provides it with an intense magnetic field and it's on collision course for Earth.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Snow Cake
recommendations.overview: A drama focused on the friendship between a high-functioning autistic woman and a man who is traumatized after a fatal car accident.
